acceptance_criteria: The game loop updates board state deterministically using fixed tick timing.
Piece spawn, gravity, lock, and game-over rules are covered by executable tests.
requirements.title: Deliver deterministic core gameplay loop and board state management

acceptance_criteria: Keyboard controls cover move, rotate, soft drop, hard drop, and pause/resume.
Scoring, level progression, line clear behavior, and hold/next constraints follow documented rules.
requirements.title: Implement player controls, scoring, line clear logic, and hold/next rules

acceptance_criteria: Board rendering and HUD show score, level, lines, hold piece, and next queue.
UI integration preserves deterministic behavior between input handlers and game state.
requirements.title: Deliver web UI integration for gameplay and HUD

acceptance_criteria: Unit, integration, and end-to-end verification commands run deterministically.
UAT scenarios for gameplay-critical flows are encoded and reproducible.
requirements.title: Operationalize verification, UAT coverage, and release hardening

scope: Web-based Tetris MVP with gameplay loop, controls, scoring, line clear logic, hold/next pieces, and test coverage.

scope_source.display: Web-based Tetris MVP with gameplay loop, controls, scoring, line clear logic, hold/next pieces, and test coverage.
scope_source.value: Web-based Tetris MVP with gameplay loop, controls, scoring, line clear logic, hold/next pieces, and test coverage.
